sentence_text: i burnt out and i still am unmotivated and feeling like shit.
I try to pay attention, I really do, but I just naturally zone out in conversations a lot or forget to do things.
I have a terrible attention span.
I feel lightheaded and sick constantly, and even the smallest chores make me tired.
I barely know what to do anymore.
This is a great idea, but I could never do this because my memory sucks.
